introductionBio: I am a Software Engineer with a strong background in Full-Stack development, specializing in Backend Architecture and system scalability. I am passionate about modernizing legacy systems and designing solutions that drive operational efficiency.
bio:
I am a Software Engineer specializing in Full-Stack development and System Architecture, with solid experience since 2017 developing scalable, high-performance solutions for the oil & gas and logistics sectors.
I have advanced expertise in Java (Spring Boot), JavaScript/TypeScript (Node, React), and SQL. My experience includes modernizing legacy systems and designing microservices architectures, leveraging technologies like Docker, Kubernetes, and PostgreSQL to build robust and efficient environments.

children.title: Senior Software Engineer
children.description:
Common Data Framework (CoDaF): As one of the main technical leaders, I optimized an internal framework for data persistence. By creating a centralized base, I eliminated information redundancy and increased data consistency across different projects, leading to greater operational efficiency.

CoDaF Wells and Rigs: I conducted interviews with specialists to model a general-use database for oil and gas solutions. This resulted in a robust foundation with approximately 100 entities that serves as a pillar for new projects, ensuring the integrity and standardization of critical business information.

Atria: Technically led the implementation of a pilot project for real-time Machine Learning data processing. This initiative enabled the monitoring of the integrity status of multiple antennas, allowing for proactive fault detection and reducing maintenance costs.

License Manager: Architectured and implemented a solution to control client access to the company's products. This system protected intellectual property and revenue streams by preventing misuse of the solutions, ensuring that clients only utilized their contracted features. I also presented the project's functionality to managers, ensuring strategic alignment and a clear understanding of its added value.

Rig State: Performed reverse engineering on an application lacking adequate documentation, which provided essential clarity to managers regarding the implemented business rules. This action unblocked the team's ability to proceed with critical modifications safely and with agility.

children.title: Junior Software Developer
children.description:
Sequence Builder + Cost Tracker: As one of the main contributors, I developed a system that optimized the planning of oil well activities by generating simulations with time and cost estimates. The system enabled more accurate planning and efficient resource allocation. The ability to compare planned versus actual data provided valuable insights, leading to continuous improvements in operational processes and cost reductions.

Dynamic Risk Advisor (DRA): I participated in the development of a real-time operational risk management tool. My contribution helped create a system that empowers users to monitor safety barriers and alerts, thereby increasing safety and efficiency in critical decision-making.

children.title: Software Developer Trainee
children.description:
Campaign Planner: Contributed to the development and maintenance of an application for managing campaigns in oil and gas operations. My work ensured the system's compatibility and functionality, directly supporting the efficient execution of complex operational plans.

PDF Extractor: Implemented a script that automated the conversion of PDF files to a specific CSV format using OCR. This solution eliminated the research team's manual and time-consuming work, accelerating the acquisition of structured data to feed machine learning models and generate new business opportunities.

experience.title: Grupo Fratelli
experience.description: Developed an end-to-end solution for multi-warehouse management and financial control. The system integrated inventory and financial operations, resulting in a significant increase in operational efficiency and providing accurate data for more strategic and informed decision-making.

certification.name: Communication: How to express yourself effectively and be understood
Unit Tests in Java - JUnit, Mockito and TDD
Learn Rust By Building Real Applications
